title: Spaced Repetition
script_summary: Exploring the science behind spaced repetition and its effectiveness in learning.

segments.voiceover: Here's what science actually says about spaced repetition.
Spaced repetition leverages the brain's natural ability to remember information more effectively over time.
But here's the twist: most don’t use it correctly! It’s not just about reviewing material...
Studies show that spacing out your reviews boosts retention by 50% or more!
So, are you ready to learn smarter? Implementing spaced repetition could change your study game for good!
Try it out and let me know your results! Follow for more science tips!
